Mixed martial arts events
2021 in Road FC
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
First dateMarch 27, 2021
Events
Fights
Chronology
2020 in Road FC 2021 in Road FC 2022 in Road FC

The year 2021 was the 12th year in the history of the Road Fighting Championship, a mixed martial arts promotion based in South Korea. 2021 starts with ARC 004.

Road FC 2021 Awards

[edit]

The following fighters won the Road FC year-end awards for 2021:

  • Road FC Fighter of the Year 2021: In Soo Hwang
  • Road FC Submission of the Year 2021: Hae Jin Park against Soo Chul Kim (ROAD FC 59)
  • Road FC Knockout of the Year 2021: Park Seung-Mo against Nandin-Erdene Munguntsooj and Shin Dong-Guk ( ARC 4 and ROAD FC 59)
  • Road FC Rookie of the Year 2021: Jung Hyun Lee and Hyun Woo Kim

List of events

[edit]

ARC 4

[edit]
ARC 003

ARC 002 ARC 003 ROAD FC 58

AfreecaTV ROAD Championship ARC 4 was a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on March 27, 2021, at the Lotte World Afreeca Colosseum, Lotte World Tower in Seoul, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

The main event featured rising heavyweight prospect Il Hak Oh fighting Jung Kyo Park. [1]

Results

[edit]
ARC 4
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes

Catchweight 75 kg Seung Mo Park def. Nandin-Erdene Munguntsooj TKO (Punches) 1 0:28
Catchweight 60 kg Jung Hyun Lee def. Jin Woo Park KO (Punch) 2 1:06

Welterweight 77 kg Je Woo Yeo def. San Kim Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Lightweight 70 kg Ji Ho Yang def. Chingun Shinkoiwa Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Bantamweight 61 kg Hyun Woo Kim def. Min Soo Cho TKO (Punches) 2 0:49
Featherweight 66 kg Yoon Joong Kim def. Min Gyu Lee Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00

ARC 5

[edit]
ARC 5
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship

VenueLotte World Afreeca Colosseum, Lotte World Tower
City Seoul, South Korea
Event chronology
ARC 004 ARC 5 ROAD FC 58

ARC 5 was a Combat sport event held by Road Fighting Championship on June 12, 2021, in Seoul, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

Two undefeated lightweight prospects, Jung Hyun Lee and Jo Min Su were scheduled to fight in the main event.[2]

In the co-main event, Jae Hyuk Heo was scheduled to fight Gi Hoon Ryu in an openweight bout.[3]

Results

[edit]
ARC 5

Featherweight 66kg Hyun Woo Kim def. Young Min Ji Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Lightweight 70kg Ji Un Choi def. Kyung Bin Jang TKO (Doctor Stoppage) 3 0:38
Welterweight 77kg Tae Young Yoon def. Sang Kwon Han Submission (Guillotine choke) 1 0:45
W.Strawweight 52kg Yoo Jung Kim def. Hyeon Ju Baeg Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Featherweight 66kg Dong Hyuk Ko def. Jin Guk Kim Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00

ROAD FC 58

[edit]
ROAD FC 58
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateJuly 3, 2021
VenueChangwon Gymnasium
City Changwon, South Korea
Event chronology
ARC 005 ROAD FC 58 ROAD FC 59

ROAD FC 58 was a Combat sport event held by Road Fighting Championship on July 3, 2021, in Changwon, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

It was announced that In Soo Hwang and Il Hak Oh would fight for the vacant ROAD FC Middleweight title.[4]

The event featured an openweight bout between the South Korean actor Geum Kwang San and Jae Hoon Kim.[5]

One-time Road FC featherweight title challenger Hae Jin Park was scheduled to meet Doo Seok Oh in the event's featured bout.[6]

Won Jun Choi was scheduled to face Dong Hwan Lim at middleweight.[7]

Two undefeated lightweights, Si Won Park and Tae Sung Kim, were scheduled to fight at this event.[8]

Three additional fights were announced on June 2: a flyweight bout between Seo Dong Soo and Kim Woo Jae, a bantamweight bout between Yang Ji Yong and Lee Jung Hyun, as well as a featherweight bout between Lee Seong Ju and Park Jin.[9]

Results

[edit]
ROAD FC 58
Weight Class Method Round T.Time Notes
Middleweight 84kg In Soo Hwang def. Il Hak Oh TKO (Punches) 2 0:34 For the vacant ROAD FC Middleweight title
Openweight Jae Hoon Kim def. Geum Kwang San TKO (Punches) 1 2:06
Middleweight 84kg Won Jun Choi def. Dong Hwan Lim Submission (Shoulder Press) 1 3:01
Featherweight 66kg Hae Jin Park def. Doo Seok Oh Submission (Kneebar) 1 0:59
Lightweight 70kg Si Won Park def. Tae Sung Kim KO (Punch) 1 1:16
Preliminary Card
Bantamweight 61kg Yang Ji Yong def. Lee Jung Hyun Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
Featherweight 66kg Park Jin def. Lee Seong Ju Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
Catchweight 60kg Sergei Choi def. Young Han Kim Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
Flyweight 57kg Kim Woo Jae def. Seo Dong Soo TKO (Punches) 2 1:45

ROAD FC 59

[edit]
ROAD FC 59
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateSeptember 4, 2021
VenueWonju Gymnasium
City Wonju, South Korea
Event chronology
ROAD FC 58 ROAD FC 59 ARC 6

ROAD FC 59 was a Combat sport event held by Road Fighting Championship on September 4, 2021, in Wonju, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

A featherweight bout between Hae Jin Park and Soo Chul Kim for the vacant ROAD FC Featherweight title was scheduled as the event headliner.[10]

A fight for the vacant ROAD FC Women's Atomweight title between Jeong Eun Park and Shin Yu-Ri was scheduled as the co-main event.[11]

A lightweight bout between Park Seung-Mo and Shin Dong-Guk was expected to take place at this event.[12]

The undefeated flyweights, Jung Hyun Lee and Davron Kholmatov, were scheduled to face each other.[13]

Six-fight Road FC veteran Gi-Won Ko was scheduled to face the eight-fight veteran Dae-Yeong Jang in a bantamweight bout.[14]

Results

[edit]
ROAD FC 59
Weight Class Method Round T.Time Notes
Featherweight 66kg Hae Jin Park def. Soo Chul Kim Submission (Guillotine Choke) 1 4:50 For the vacant ROAD FC Featherweight title.
Women's Atomweight 48kg Shim Yu-Ri def. Jeong Eun Park Decision (Split) 3 5:00 For the vacant ROAD FC Women's Atomweight title.
Lightweight 70kg Park Seung-Mo def. Shin Dong-Guk TKO (Punches) 1 0:25
Openweight Bae Dong-Hyun def. Ryu Ki-Hoon TKO (Punches) 1 2:50
Flyweight 57kg Jung Hyun Lee def. Young Han Kim KO (Punches) 1 2:53
Preliminary Card
Bantamweight 61kg Gi-Won Ko def. Dae-Yeong Jang KO (Punches) 1 0:24
Catchweight 72kg Yeo Je-Woo def. Shoiatbek Bazarbaev KO (Punch) 1 2:10
Bantamweight 61kg Yoo Jae-Nam def. Ko Dong-Hyeok KO (Punch) 1 0:20
Catchweight 63 Kim Hyun-Woo def. Park-Jae-Seong TKO (Punches) 1 1:41
W.Flyweight 57kg Shin Yu-Jin def. Lee Eun-Jung Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 4:50
Lightweight 70kg Lee Min-Gyu def. Shin Yoon Seo TKO (Head Kick and Punches) 1 4:19
Catchweight 63kg Park Min-Su def. Le Sin-Woo TKO (Punches) 2 0:38

Event chronology
ROAD FC 59 ARC 6 Arc 7

ARC 6 was a Combat sport event held by Road Fighting Championship on October 30, 2021, at the Lotte World Afreeca Colosseum, Lotte World Tower in Seoul, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

The event was headlined by a 60kg catchweight bout between Jung Hyun Lee and Sergei Choi.[15]

Results

[edit]
ARC 6
Weight Class Method Round T.Time Notes
Catchweight 60kg Jung Hyun Lee def. Sergei Choi Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight 72kg Kyung Bin Jang def. Ji Ho Yang Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight 86kg Tae Young Yoon def. Seung Ho Jung Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Welterweight 77kg San Kim def. Sang Kwon Han Submission (Triangle Choke) 3 0:50
W.Strawweight 52kg Eun Jung Lee def. Seo Young Park Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Bantamweight 61kg Jin Woo Park def. Min Soo Cho TKO (Punches) 2 2:00
Catchweight 68kg Min Soo Park def. Min Woo Kwon Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight 69kg Min Hyung Han def. Hyung Woo Yoo TKO (Punches) 1 1:15
